caption: User Management
description: User Management events report when specific user account management tasks are performed, such as a user being created, changed, deleted, renamed, disabled, enabled, locked out or unlocked.
name: user_management

1.caption: Create
1.description: Create a user. Populate the user object with details of the user.

2.caption: Update
2.description: Update a user. The updated user details should be populated in the updated_user attribute.

7.caption: Unlock
7.description: Unlock a previously locked out user.

8.caption: Password Change
8.description: An attempt to change a user password.

9.caption: Password Reset
9.description: An attempt to reset a user password.

10.caption: Attach Policy
10.description: Attach an IAM Policy to a user.

11.caption: Detach Policy
11.description: Detach an IAM Policy from a user.

12.caption: MFA Factor Enable
12.description: Enable one or more authentication factors for a user.

13.caption: MFA Factor Disable
13.description: Disable one or more authentication factors for a user.

16.caption: Assign Roles
16.description: Assign one or more roles to a user.

17.caption: Remove Roles
17.description: Remove one or more roles from a user.

auth_factors.description: Details about the authentication factors associated with the MFA Factor Enable/Disable activities.

iam_roles.description: One or more roles assigned to or removed from a user.

policies.description: Details about the IAM policies associated with the Attach/Detach Policy activities.

privileges.description: Set of privileges assigned to a user.

resources.description: Resources that the privileges give access to.

user.description: The user that was a target of an activity.

updated_user.description:
The result of an updated user.

When the update is successful, this is the newly updated user. Upon failure, represents the attempted state of the user.
